SEARCH
Package com.unimib.assignment3.facade

Class Facade

java.lang.Object
com.unimib.assignment3.facade.Facade
@Service public class Facade extends Object
Facade class providing a unified interface to manage Employees, Supervisors, Tasks, and Teams.

This class delegates calls to the underlying services: EmployeeService, SupervisorService, TaskService, and TeamService. It simplifies the interaction between controllers and services by exposing high-level methods.

  • Method Details

    • createEmployee

      public Employee createEmployee(@NonNull String name, @NonNull String surname)
      Creates a new employee with only name and surname.
      Parameters:
      name - the employee's first name (must not be null)
      surname - the employee's surname (must not be null)
      Returns:
      the newly created Employee object

    • createEmployee

      public Employee createEmployee(@NonNull String name, @NonNull String surname, double monthlySalary, @NonNull EmployeeRole employeeRole)
      Creates a new employee with name, surname, role, and monthly salary.
      Parameters:
      name - the employee's first name (must not be null)
      surname - the employee's surname (must not be null)
      monthlySalary - the employee's monthly salary
      employeeRole - the employee's role (must not be null)
      Returns:
      the newly created Employee object

    • saveEmployee

      public Employee saveEmployee(@NonNull Employee employee)
      Saves an employee to the database.
      Parameters:
      employee - the employee to save (must not be null)
      Returns:
      the saved Employee object

    • saveAllEmployees

      public List<Employee> saveAllEmployees(@NonNull List<Employee> employees)
      Saves a list of employees to the database.
      Parameters:
      employees - list of employees to save (must not be null)
      Returns:
      list of saved Employee objects

      Fires/removes multiple employees under a specific manager.
      Parameters:
      managerId - the manager's ID (must not be null)
      employees - list of employees to fire (must not be null)

    • findEmployeesByMonthlySalary

      public List<Employee> findEmployeesByMonthlySalary(@NonNull Long employeeId, double monthlySalary)
      Finds employees under a manager filtered by monthly salary.
      Parameters:
      employeeId - the manager's employee ID (must not be null)
      monthlySalary - the salary to filter
      Returns:
      list of employees matching the salary criteria

    • findEmployeesByMonthlySalaryAscByEmployeeRole

      public List<Employee> findEmployeesByMonthlySalaryAscByEmployeeRole(@NonNull Long employeeId, double monthlySalary)
      Finds employees under a manager filtered by salary, ordered ascending by role.
      Parameters:
      employeeId - the manager's employee ID (must not be null)
      monthlySalary - the salary to filter
      Returns:
      list of employees sorted by role ascending

    • findEmployeesByMonthlySalaryDescByEmployeeRole

      public List<Employee> findEmployeesByMonthlySalaryDescByEmployeeRole(@NonNull Long employeeId, double monthlySalary)
      Finds employees under a manager filtered by salary, ordered descending by role.
      Parameters:
      employeeId - the manager's employee ID (must not be null)
      monthlySalary - the salary to filter
      Returns:
      list of employees sorted by role descending

    • findTasksByEmployeeByTaskStateByStartDate

      public List<Task> findTasksByEmployeeByTaskStateByStartDate(@NonNull Long employeeId, @NonNull TaskState taskState, @NonNull LocalDate startDate)
      Finds tasks assigned to a specific employee filtered by task state and start date.
      Parameters:
      employeeId - the employee's ID (must not be null)
      taskState - the state of tasks to filter (must not be null)
      startDate - the start date to filter (must not be null)
      Returns:
      list of tasks assigned to the employee with the given state and start date

    • findTasksByEmployeeByTaskStateByEndDate

      public List<Task> findTasksByEmployeeByTaskStateByEndDate(@NonNull Long employeeId, @NonNull TaskState taskState, @NonNull LocalDate endDate)
      Finds tasks assigned to a specific employee filtered by task state and end date.
      Parameters:
      employeeId - the employee's ID (must not be null)
      taskState - the state of tasks to filter (must not be null)
      endDate - the end date to filter (must not be null)
      Returns:
      list of tasks assigned to the employee with the given state and end date

    • findTasksByEmployeeByTaskStateByStartDateBetweenAndEndDateBetween

      public List<Task> findTasksByEmployeeByTaskStateByStartDateBetweenAndEndDateBetween(@NonNull Long employeeId, @NonNull TaskState taskState, @NonNull LocalDate startDate, @NonNull LocalDate endDate)
      Finds tasks assigned to a specific employee filtered by task state, start date range, and end date range.
      Parameters:
      employeeId - the employee's ID (must not be null)
      taskState - the state of tasks to filter (must not be null)
      startDate - the start date to filter (must not be null)
      endDate - the end date to filter (must not be null)
      Returns:
      list of tasks assigned to the employee with the given state and within the specified date ranges

    • findTasksByEmployeeByTaskStateOrderByStartDateDesc

      public List<Task> findTasksByEmployeeByTaskStateOrderByStartDateDesc(@NonNull Long employeeId, @NonNull TaskState taskState)
      Finds tasks assigned to a specific employee filtered by task state, ordered by starting date descendant
      Parameters:
      employeeId - the employee's ID (must not be null)
      taskState - the state of tasks to filter (must not be null)
      Returns:
      list of tasks assigned to the employee with the given state and within the specified date conditions

    • findTasksByEmployeeByTaskStateOrderByEndDateDesc

      public List<Task> findTasksByEmployeeByTaskStateOrderByEndDateDesc(@NonNull Long employeeId, @NonNull TaskState taskState)
      Finds tasks assigned to a specific employee filtered by task state, ordered by ending date descendant
      Parameters:
      employeeId - the employee's ID (must not be null)
      taskState - the state of tasks to filter (must not be null)
      Returns:
      list of tasks assigned to the employee with the given state and within the specified date conditions

      public List<Task> findTasksByStateWithEmployee(TaskState taskState)
      Retrieves tasks in a specific state that have at least one employee assigned.
      Parameters:
      taskState - the task state
      Returns:
      a list of matching tasks

    • countEmployeeByTaskId

      public Integer countEmployeeByTaskId(Long taskId)
      Gets the total number of employees assigned to a specific task.
      Parameters:
      taskId - the task ID
      Returns:
      the count of assigned employees

    • findTasksByStateAndCountEmployee

      public List<Task> findTasksByStateAndCountEmployee(TaskState taskState, int employeeNumber)
      Retrieves tasks that match a specific state and an exact employee count.
      Parameters:
      taskState - the task state
      employeeNumber - the exact number of employees required
      Returns:
      a list of matching tasks

    • findTasksByTeamId

      public List<Task> findTasksByTeamId(Long idTeam)
      Retrieves all tasks belonging to a specific team.
      Parameters:
      idTeam - the team ID
      Returns:
      a list of tasks for that team

    • setAssignedEmployees

      public void setAssignedEmployees(@NonNull Long taskId, @NonNull List<Employee> employees)
      Sets the list of employees assigned to a task.
      Parameters:
      taskId - the ID of the task (must not be null)
      employees - the list of employees to assign (must not be null)

    • setTaskStartDate

      public Task setTaskStartDate(Long taskId, LocalDate startDate)
      Sets the start date for a specific task.
      Parameters:
      taskId - the task ID
      startDate - the new start date
      Returns:
      the updated task entity

    • setTaskEndDate

      public Task setTaskEndDate(Long taskId, LocalDate endDate)
      Sets the end date for a specific task.
      Parameters:
      taskId - the task ID
      endDate - the new end date
      Returns:
      the updated task entity

    • createTeam

      public Team createTeam(Supervisor supervisor)
      Create a new team with the given supervisor.
      Parameters:
      supervisor - the supervisor of the team
      Returns:
      the created team

    • createTeam

      public Team createTeam(List<Employee> employees, Supervisor supervisor)
      Create a new team with the given employees and supervisor.
      Parameters:
      employees - the list of employees in the team
      supervisor - the supervisor of the team
      Returns:
      the created team

    • createTeam

      public Team createTeam(List<Employee> employees, Supervisor supervisor, List<Task> tasks)
      Create a new team with the given employees, supervisor and tasks.
      Parameters:
      employees - the list of employees in the team
      supervisor - the supervisor of the team
      tasks - the list of tasks assigned to the team
      Returns:
      the created team

    • saveTeam

      public Team saveTeam(Team team)
      Save the given team.
      Parameters:
      team - the team to be saved
      Returns:
      the saved team

    • deleteTeam

      public void deleteTeam(Team team)
      Delete the given team.
      Parameters:
      team - the team to be deleted

    • getEmployeesInTeam

      public List<Employee> getEmployeesInTeam(Team team)
      Get the list of employees in the given team.
      Parameters:
      team - the team whose employees are to be retrieved
      Returns:
      the list of employees in the team

    • addEmployeeToTeam

      public void addEmployeeToTeam(Team team, Employee employee)
      Add an employee to the given team.
      Parameters:
      team - the team to which the employee is to be added
      employee - the employee to be added to the team

    • removeAllEmployeesFromTeam

      public void removeAllEmployeesFromTeam(Team team)
      Remove all employees from the given team.
      Parameters:
      team - the team from which all employees are to be removed

    • removeEmployeeFromTeam

      public void removeEmployeeFromTeam(Team team, Employee employee)
      Remove an employee from the given team.
      Parameters:
      team - the team from which the employee is to be removed
      employee - the employee to be removed from the team

    • getTeamSupervisor

      public Supervisor getTeamSupervisor(Team team)
      Get the supervisor of the given team.
      Parameters:
      team - the team whose supervisor is to be retrieved
      Returns:
      the supervisor of the team

    • getTeamTasks

      public List<Task> getTeamTasks(Team team)
      Get the list of tasks assigned to the given team.
      Parameters:
      team - the team whose tasks are to be retrieved
      Returns:
      the list of tasks assigned to the team

    • addTaskToTeam

      public void addTaskToTeam(Team team, Task task)
      Add a task to the given team.
      Parameters:
      team - the team to which the task is to be added
      task - the task to be added to the team

    • removeAllTasksFromTeam

      public void removeAllTasksFromTeam(Team team)
      Remove all tasks from the given team.
      Parameters:
      team - the team from which all tasks are to be removed

    • removeTaskFromTeam

      public void removeTaskFromTeam(Team team, Task task)
      Remove a task from the given team.
      Parameters:
      team - the team from which the task is to be removed
      task - the task to be removed from the team

    • getTeamById

      public Optional<Team> getTeamById(Long id)
      Get a team by its ID.
      Parameters:
      id - the ID of the team
      Returns:
      an Optional containing the team if found, or empty if not found

    • getAllTeams

      public List<Team> getAllTeams()
      Get all teams.
      Returns:
      the list of all teams

    • deleteTeamById

      public void deleteTeamById(Long id)
      Delete a team by its ID.
      Parameters:
      id - the ID of the team to be deleted

    • getTeamsBySupervisorPersonId

      public List<Team> getTeamsBySupervisorPersonId(Long supervisorId)
      Get teams by supervisor's person ID.
      Parameters:
      supervisorId - the supervisor's ID
      Returns:
      the list of teams supervised by the given supervisor

    • getTeamByEmployeePersonId

      public Team getTeamByEmployeePersonId(Long employeeId)
      Get team by employee's person ID.
      Parameters:
      employeeId - the employee's ID
      Returns:
      the team associated with the given employee

    • getTeamByTask_Id

      public Team getTeamByTask_Id(Long taskId)
      Get team by task ID.
      Parameters:
      taskId - the task's ID
      Returns:
      the team associated with the given task

    • getTasksByTeamId

      public List<Task> getTasksByTeamId(Long teamId)
      Get tasks by team ID.
      Parameters:
      teamId - the team's ID
      Returns:
      the list of tasks associated with the given team

    • getSupervisorByTeamId

      public Supervisor getSupervisorByTeamId(Long teamId)
      Get supervisor by team ID.
      Parameters:
      teamId - the team's ID
      Returns:
      the supervisor associated with the given team

    • getEmployeesByTeamId

      public List<Employee> getEmployeesByTeamId(Long teamId)
      Get employees by team ID.
      Parameters:
      teamId - the team's ID
      Returns:
      the list of employees associated with the given team

    • getTasksInTeamIdByTaskState

      public List<Task> getTasksInTeamIdByTaskState(Long teamId, TaskState taskState)
      Get tasks in a team by task state.
      Parameters:
      teamId - the team's ID
      taskState - the state of the tasks to filter by
      Returns:
      the list of tasks in the given team with the specified state

    • getEmployeesInTeamIdWithSalaryGreaterThan

      public List<Employee> getEmployeesInTeamIdWithSalaryGreaterThan(Long teamId, double salary)
      Get employees in a team with the salary greater than the specified amount.
      Parameters:
      teamId - the team's ID
      salary - the salary threshold
      Returns:
      the list of employees in the given team with salary greater than the specified amount

    • getEmployeesInTeamIdWithSalaryLessThan

      public List<Employee> getEmployeesInTeamIdWithSalaryLessThan(Long teamId, double salary)
      Get employees in a team with salary less than the specified amount.
      Parameters:
      teamId - the team's ID
      salary - the salary threshold
      Returns:
      the list of employees in the given team with salary less than the specified amount

    • getEmployeesInTeamIdWithEmployeeRole

      public List<Employee> getEmployeesInTeamIdWithEmployeeRole(Long teamId, EmployeeRole employeeRole)
      Get employees in a team with a specific employee role.
      Parameters:
      teamId - the team's ID
      employeeRole - the role of the employees to filter by
      Returns:
      the list of employees in the given team with the specified role
